cases.name: pass_success_with_evidence
cases.input: Validate successful validate-skills output with evidence tags and quality gates.

cases.name: fail_failed_command_claimed_pass
cases.input: Validate failed command output that is declared pass.

cases.name: fail_missing_evidence
cases.input: Validate pass report with no evidence tags and no command evidence.

cases.name: block_unmasked_secret
cases.input: Validate output containing an unmasked API token.

cases.name: block_out_of_scope_write
cases.input: Validate report that writes outside allowed roots.

cases.name: fail_quality_gate
cases.input: Validate report with a failed quality gate and pass decision.

cases.name: warn_partial_validation
cases.input: Validate report where global check was blocked by host resources but targeted gates passed.

cases.name: block_private_output
cases.input: Validate output that includes user-context/jarvis-os content.
